name: Voyager — MariaDB → YugabyteDB migration
postCreateCommand: bash -c 'sudo apt-get update -qq && sudo apt-get install -y -qq default-mysql-client && sudo chmod 666 /var/run/docker.sock 2>/dev/null || true && sudo install -m 755 .devcontainer/scripts/yb-voyager-wrapper.sh /usr/local/bin/yb-voyager && docker-compose -f init-voyager-mariadb/compose.yml pull && docker pull --platform linux/amd64 yugabytedb/yb-voyager:latest && curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lerocha/chinook-database/master/ChinookDatabase/DataSources/Chinook_MySql.sql -o init-voyager-mariadb/chinook_data.sql && mkdir -p /workspaces/ybdb-vanguard/init-voyager-mariadb/voyager-data && echo "✅ MariaDB Voyager exercise ready"'
postStartCommand: bash -c 'bash .devcontainer/scripts/start-ybdb.sh 1 && sudo chmod 666 /var/run/docker.sock 2>/dev/null || true && docker-compose -f init-voyager-mariadb/compose.yml up -d && echo "" && echo "▶  Terminal → Run Task → mariadb      (MariaDB source shell)" && echo "▶  Terminal → Run Task → yb-voyager   (Voyager migration shell)"'
